rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts, avoiding subcomponent ports
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use valid AGREE syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, assign declarations
Component type contracts should define input assumptions and output guarantees with concrete bounds or relations
Ensure type declarations match actual expression types (int, real, bool)
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equation declarations
Use const name : type = value; for constant declarations
Use guarantee "label": expression; for output range guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
